steps: From the table, $f(0)=29$, so the y-intercept is $b=29$.

• Choice A — '$f(x)=3x+29$': Slope 3, y-intercept 29. Gives $f(0)=29$, $f(1)=32$, $f(2)=35$. ✓
  • Choice B — '$f(x)=29x+32$': $f(0)=32 e 29$. ✗
  • Choice C — '$f(x)=35x+29$': $f(1)=64 e 32$. ✗
  • Choice D — '$f(x)=32x+35$': $f(0)=35 e 29$. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
